creator: sobomax@altavista.net
text:
After some additional testing I've found that SDL really is very unhappy
with BSD pthreads (you know - random crashes, lockups etc.), so I've
switched to linuxthreads which solved problems. Also it seems that DGA
is now broken at least for recent XFree 3.3.5 running on 4.0-Current, so
I've disabled it by that time when it will work again...

I'm attaching updated patch against original  SDL 0.10 port.

-Maxim
